---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# create directories

dir.create("../xlsx/inj", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

dir.create("../xlsx/inj/dem", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/inj/prf", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/inj/mon", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")
dir.create("../xlsx/inj/sec", showWarnings = TRUE, recursive = FALSE, mode = "0777")

```


```{r}
# h26 age
# NA

# h27 age
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177251.xlsx

# h28
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347718.xlsx

# h29 
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711847.xlsx

# h30
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539683.xlsx

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821461.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262167.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122108.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258326.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493140.xlsx


url_dem <- c("https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177251.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347718.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711847.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539683.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821461.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262167.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122108.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258326.xlsx",
             "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493140.xlsx")
```

```{r}
file_dem <- url_dem %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_dem <- paste0("../xlsx/inj/dem/", file_dem)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_dem)){
  download.file(url_dem[i], path_dem[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_dem[i], "downloaded"))
}
```


```{r}
# h26 pref
# NA

# h27 pref
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177253.xlsx

# h28
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347719.xlsx

# h29
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711848.xlsx

# h30
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539684.xlsx

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821462.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262168.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122109.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258327.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493141.xlsx

url_prf <- c(
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/file/06-Seisakujouhou-12400000-Hokenkyoku/0000177253.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000347719.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000711848.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000539684.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821462.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262168.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122109.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258327.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493141.xlsx"
)
```

```{r}
file_prf <- url_prf %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_prf <- paste0("../xlsx/inj/prf/", file_prf)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_prf)){
  download.file(url_prf[i], path_prf[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_prf[i], "downloaded"))
}
```

```{r}
# monthly

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821460.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262169.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122110.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258328.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493142.xlsx


url_mon <- c(
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821460.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262169.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122110.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258328.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493142.xlsx"
)

```

```{r}
file_mon <- url_mon %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_mon <- paste0("../xlsx/inj/mon/", file_mon)
```


```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_mon)){
  download.file(url_mon[i], path_mon[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_mon[i], "downloaded"))
}
```

```{r}
# secondary

# h31
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821463.xlsx

# r2
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262170.xlsx

# r3
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122111.xlsx

# r4
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258329.xlsx

# r5
# https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493143.xlsx

url_sec <- c(
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/000821463.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001262170.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001122111.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001258329.xlsx",
  "https://www.mhlw.go.jp/content/12400000/001493143.xlsx"
)
```

```{r}
file_sec <- url_sec %>% str_extract("00[:digit:]+\\.xlsx")

path_sec <- paste0("../xlsx/inj/sec/", file_sec)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(url_sec)){
  download.file(url_sec[i], path_sec[i], mode = "wb")
  print(paste(file_sec[i], "downloaded"))
}
```
